title: Warm & beachy week — rank's live finalists
intro: Rank's own cut from a live run of the leg-intent engine: six Honolulu round trips — economy one way, premium the other, split across Alaska and American — plus its one notable stretch, an all-business round trip on Alaska alone. Every ranked finalist misses your business preference on both legs; the stretch clears it, and pays with a risky-short Phoenix connection out and a dead-long Los Angeles layover home. The return lands wherever the west-coast home union is cheapest — Phoenix, San Diego, or San Francisco — and every outbound rides the soft-date padding just ahead of your September 6 window, because the near-misses won on price. Pick a journey, or leave feedback under any card. The six ranked journeys sit out the picker: their American premium legs carry taxes in an unstated currency, and a picker row needs one.

submit.label: Send my pick
submit.note: I'll pull transfer paths and booking steps for the journey you choose.

blocks.title: 1 · Honolulu — 62,000 miles (Alaska + American), Aug 31 out, Sep 6 home to PHX

**Judgment** — the run's verdicts for this journey:
- ✅ **Affordability** — promote: 12,500 Alaska Atmos Rewards + 49,500 American AAdvantage miles; both balances cover.
- ℹ️ **Layovers** — neutral both directions: nonstop, no connection to weigh.
- ⚠️ **Cabin** — economy out, premium economy home; 358 + 345 minutes below your business preference.
